properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key used to sign JWT tokens.

properties.name: jwt.expiration-ms
properties.description: JWT token expiration time in milliseconds.

properties.name: auth.verification.expiration-minutes
properties.description: Email verification code expiration time in minutes.

properties.name: ocr.api-key
properties.description: OCR.Space API key for receipt text extraction.

properties.name: gemini.api-key
properties.description: Google Gemini API key for AI extraction.

properties.name: gemini.model
properties.description: Primary Gemini model name for generateContent requests.

properties.name: cors.allowed-origin-patterns
properties.description: Comma-separated CORS origin patterns (supports ngrok wildcards).

properties.name: app.frontend.url
properties.description: Public frontend URL for emails and Mercado Pago back URLs.

properties.name: mercadopago.access-token
properties.description: Optional Mercado Pago access token fallback for Checkout Pro.
